notes: This file contains a minimal Genesis-to-Revelation biblical event skeleton.
It stores Scripture references only and does not store Bible text.
It is now connected to the Timeline Events preview through the route server loader.
Dates and historical context remain supporting labels only and do not assert exact external chronology.
This package does not include Korean or world reference rows.
